rows.text: CAD Agent ready. Ask me to model something.
Finish or stop the current turn first.

questions.question: What level of detail should I model for the house?

options.label: Simple massing (recommended)
options.description: A single solid representing the house volume — quick to create, good for concept massing.

options.label: Basic architecture
options.description: Walls, roof, doors, and windows — suitable for floor plans and elevations.

options.label: Detailed
options.description: Rooms, stairs, window frames, and basic furniture — more time to model.

questions.question: How many floors do you want?

options.description: Two floors with a stair — moderate effort.
Three floors — highest effort and time.

options.label: Default 10×8 m (recommended)
options.description: A medium-sized footprint: 10.0 m by 8.0 m.

options.label: Custom dimensions
options.description: I will provide width and depth in metres (e.g., 12 x 9).

questions.question: Which roof style do you prefer?

options.label: Gable (recommended)
options.description: Classic pitched roof with two slopes.

options.label: Hip
options.description: Pitched roof sloping on all sides.

rows.text: I'll create a new FreeCAD document and model a simple 10×8 m single-story house massing with a gable roof (3.0 m wall height, 30° pitch, 200 mm overhang); I'll save it as ./house.FCStd.

try:
    # Inputs from environment
    out = os.environ["FC_DOC"]
    # Dimensions (mm)

    H = 3000.0   # wall height Z (3000 mm = 3 m…
